title: calophyllum polyanthum
intro: Calophyllum polyanthum, also known as the polyalthia or polyanthus, is a tree species native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands, characterized by its large, evergreen leaves and fragrant flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and improve overall health. The health benefits of Calophyllum polyanthum include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting cardiovascular health, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant include extracts, oils, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
